title: Paxels
description: Paxels adds simple multi-tools that combine pickaxe, axe, and shovel functionality into one convenient tool.
body:
# Paxels

![Paxels](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75e8172985bded3f522791228a53ef24a654d334.png)

**Paxels** adds lightweight multi-tools called **Paxel**. A **Paxel** combines an **axe**, **shovel**, and **pickaxe** into one practical tool.

To get a paxel, craft the matching axe, shovel, and pickaxe together. The **diamond paxel** can be upgraded to **netherite** like other diamond equipment.

Paxels automatically work as the correct tool for compatible blocks and also support common right-click actions:

- **Right-click logs** to strip them
- **Right-click dirt-like blocks** to create paths
- **Shift + right-click dirt-like blocks** to create farmland

Compatible tool enchantments are supported, so every Paxel can be improved like regular Minecraft tools.
